rulings.Case Title: FLORES VS MERITECH MORTGAGE SERVICES INC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plntf'S Application For An Order To Pay Unclaimed Funds To Plntf Lydia Flores
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 2, 2012, line 1. PLAINTIFF LYDIA (PP) FLORES's Application For An Order To Pay Unclaimed Funds To Plaintiff Lydia Flores. Deny. 1) Untimely beyond 60 days of publication; 2) No showing how claimant entitled to funds per Jan. 28, 2002 judgment paragraph 4 this case. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROY POOLE et al VS. DORIS EASLEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 2, 2012, line 9. Temporary Restraining Order. Hearing required to address judgment, tenancy at will and $75,000.00. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LARAMAR URBAN SPECIALTY PARTNERS VS. JOHN MORIRATY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 2, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT JOHN MORIARTY's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Deny, failed to show due diligence; untimely under section CCP 473. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KELLY A. ARCHER et al VS. MAURICE OHAYON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 2, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT MAURICE OHAYON's Motion To Quash Writ. Continued to May 9, 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAZ CABANSAGAN VS. ANGELA SILVA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery To Establish Admissions From Deft And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defts; Memo Of P&A
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 2, 2012, line 4. PLAINTIFF PAZ CABANSAGAN's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery To Establish Admissions From Defendant And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant. Grant, subject to opposition, plus monetary sanctions totalling $750.00. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. JOSE A RAMOS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 2, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANTs FREDDY GARCIA and MILTON GARCIA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Grant, subject to opposition. Claimant - tenants therefore, notice fatally defective as to these tenants. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KALPESH GOHIL VS. HERBERT HOLLAND et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 2, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT HERBERT HOLLAND's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off calendar, reset to May 22, 2012 per moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: N.R. PATEL DBA HENRY HOTEL et al VS. DONALD BRUNMEIER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 2, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT DONALD BRUNMEIER's Motion To Strike. Grant motion to strike paragraph 17f with leave to amend. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TODD BENNETT VS. EDDIE SAUNDERS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 2, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANTs EDDIE SAUNDERS and CARLOS GONZALEZ's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny, failed to shift burder. Didn't provide authority or evidence to contest sufficiency of "change of terms" and eviction per San Francisco Rent Ordinance 37.2(R), 37.9(a)(8) and Regulation Rule 12.20(1). = (501/REQ)
